name: slskd-mcp
description: MCP server for slskd (Soulseek daemon) REST API. Exposes search, transfer management, and share operations.
safety: All download actions require explicit user confirmation.
API key must be in env vars, never in prompts or code.
Monitor disk usage before large batch downloads.
notes: slskd must be running and accessible at SLSKD_API_URL. Replace placeholder values with your actual configuration.
